projects.name: Mixed Reality Game
projects.description: This project aims to develop a puzzle game for Mixed Reality Environment as Hololens 2 (on which I have worked). This puzzle game challenges the user to solve 3d holographic puzzle game. There is 3 different level of difficulty. A tutorial is also implemented to teach the user how to interact with Holographic pieces.

projects.name: ECG Classifier
projects.description: This project aims to develop a deep learning model able to predict the emotional state (stress/no stress) of an individual based on its ElectroCardiogram signal. The model has been train on the WESAD dataset WESAD dataset.

projects.name: Pupil diameter Classifier
projects.description: This project aims to develop a deep learning model able to predict the emotional state (stress/no stress) of an individual based on its Pupil diameter evolution. The model has been train on a dataset built by Pedrotti et al
